name: Louisiana Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Louisiana - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: Louisiana Department of Health, Health Standards Section, P. O. Box 3767, Baton Rouge, LA 70821

processingTime: 1 to 2 Weeks after passing the competency exam

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: How much does Louisiana CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The endorsement application fee is $35. Additional costs may include background check fees.
Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Louisiana.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Louisiana?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Louisiana while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
